debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
stmt : StmtIn
wit : WitIn
prover : Prover oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut pSpec
⊢ Prod.fst <$>
      ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (pSpec.FullTranscript × StmtOut × WitOut)
          (@Prover.run ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec stmt wit prover)).run =
    @Prover.run ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec stmt wit prover

failed_attempts:
induction prover.run stmt wit using OracleComp.induction with
  | pure a => simp
  | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
  | failure => simp

induction prover.run stmt wit using OracleComp.induction with
  | pure a => simp
  | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
  | failure => simp

have h : ∀ (α : Type) (oa : OracleComp (oSpec + (challengeOracleInterface pSpec).spec) α),
      Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle oa).run = oa := fun α oa => by
    induction oa using OracleComp.induction with
    | pure a => simp
    | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
    | failure => simp
  exact h _ (prover.run stmt wit)

induction (prover.run stmt wit) using OracleComp.induction with
  | pure a => simp
  | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
  | failure => simp

induction prover.run stmt wit using OracleComp.induction with
  | pure a => simp
  | query_bind i t oa ih => simp [simulateQ_bind, ih]
  | failure => simp
